<a id="kind-connection"></a>
## Connection

Manage OCI Database Migration connections.

- `Plural`: `connections`
- `Scope`: `Namespaced`
- `APIVersion`: `databasemigration.oracle.com/v1beta1`
- `Sample`: [Sample](../../../samples/databasemigration/v1beta1/connection.md) (`config/samples/databasemigration_v1beta1_connection.yaml`)
- `Packages`: Not currently exposed by a customer-visible package.
